title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prenatal assessments to help all people begin prenatal care and connect to other resources in their communities. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, and dental care referrals. Referrals are available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. 1109 June Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Pregnant women at any stage of pregnancy Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-1115 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-1115 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, other languages available through Language Link AREA SERVED: Hood River County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BRIDGES TO HEALTH PATHWAYS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
